forecast_text:
PHZ112-161430-
Kauai Leeward Waters-
347 PM HST Wed Jul 15 2026

.TONIGHT...East southeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 4 to 5 feet.
Wave Detail: East southeast 4 feet at 6 seconds. Hazy. Scattered
showers. 
.THURSDAY...East winds 10 to 15 knots, rising to 15 to 20 knots
in the afternoon. Seas to 5 feet. Wave Detail: East southeast
4 feet at 6 seconds. Hazy in the morning. Isolated showers. 
.THURSDAY NIGHT...East winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 5 to 6 feet.
Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 6 seconds. Scattered showers. 
.FRIDAY...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 5 to 6 feet.
Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 6 seconds and south southwest 3 feet
at 16 seconds. Isolated showers in the morning. 
.FRIDAY NIGHT...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 5 to
7 feet. Wave Detail: East 6 feet at 7 seconds and south 3 feet at
14 seconds. 
.SATURDAY...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 5 to
7 feet. Wave Detail: East 6 feet at 7 seconds and south 3 feet at
13 seconds. 
.SATURDAY NIGHT...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 5 to
6 feet. Wave Detail: East 6 feet at 7 seconds. Isolated showers. 
.SUNDAY...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 4 to 6 feet.
Wave Detail: East 6 feet at 7 seconds and south 3 feet at
17 seconds. Isolated showers after midnight. 
.MONDAY...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 4 to 5 feet.
Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 6 seconds and south 4 feet at
16 seconds. Isolated showers. Scattered showers after midnight.
